text:
There once was a cat named Mittens. Mittens lived in a cottage on top of a mountain. She loved sleeping curled up in a ball by the fireplace.

One day a thief climbed up the mountain to steal Mittens' treasures. But Mittens was home. She saw the thief and ran outside, miaoming!

The thief didn't think cats could fight. He cornered her. Mittens purr-fessed fearlessly. Clawed. Scratched.

Eventually, Mittens jumped on a branch and darted away. She ran until she saw a hawk. She climbed onto his back.

The hawk let her ride. Finally, she dropped off onto some gravel.

No harm came to Mittens.
